# ShipVitals

ShipVitals is an open-source release-readiness audit for AI-built apps. It runs declared project checks, records static findings and missing evidence, and returns READY, ALMOST READY, NOT READY, or DEMO ONLY.

## Primary sources

- Product: https://omarkhandji-commits.github.io/shipvitals/
- Installation: https://omarkhandji-commits.github.io/shipvitals/install/
- Methodology: https://omarkhandji-commits.github.io/shipvitals/methodology/
- Benchmarks: https://omarkhandji-commits.github.io/shipvitals/benchmarks/
- Comparison: https://omarkhandji-commits.github.io/shipvitals/compare/
- Source: https://github.com/omarkhandji-commits/shipvitals

ShipVitals does not replace tests, browser automation, security scanners, or code review. It combines their evidence with product and release context.
